name: Murgh Korma- Quick Chicken Korma - India
recipeIngredient: 1 1 1/2 inches piece fresh ginger root, peeled and chopped
3 lbs chicken pieces, skinned, cut into servings
1 teaspoon chili powder, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the ginger, garlic, and 3 tablespoons of water into a smooth paste.
2. Heat oil in a wide frying pan over high heat until very hot.
3. Add bay leaves, cinnamon stick, cardamom pods, cloves, and cumin seeds to the pan. Stir.
4. Add finely chopped onions and stir-fry for about 3 minutes or until they turn brownish.
5. Add the smooth paste from the blender, ground coriander, and ground cumin. Cook for a minute.
6. Add chopped tomatoes and cook for another minute.
7. Add chicken pieces, chili powder, salt, and 1 cup water to the pan. Bring to a boil.
8. Reduce heat to medium and simmer for 15 minutes, turning the chicken pieces over occasionally.
9. Remove the cover, add cream, and return to high heat. Cook for another 7-8 minutes or until the sauce thickens.
10. Stir gently before serving.
